headline: Goldman Sachs delivers clear message on interest rate cuts
summary: Wall Street is booming, but Goldman Sachs isn’t convinced that lower interest rates are around the corner. In an interview with CNBC, Goldman Sachs COO John Waldron reiterated the bank's view that the Federal Reserve could start cutting interest rates by the close of 2026. Put simply, Americans may ...
